description.unified: ATK rises by [15%->20%] and ACC rises by [120->400%].
Increases all allies DEF Penetration by [60->150] and ACC by [60->75]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [30->50] additional DEF Penetration and [30->25] additional ACC apply.
Successful Crit Attack reduces enemy recovery rate by [24%->50%] and deal Physical continuous DMG every second equal to 20% ATK. Does not stack.
Crit Chance is increased by [185->150] and Crit DMG is increased by [24%->30%].
Every 5 sec, increases own Crit DMG by [3%->4%]. This effect can be stacked up to max [24->25] times and is irremovable.
ATK rises by [15%->20%] and DEF Penetration rises by [120->200].
Per every sec, Dodge rate is increased by [50->100]. This effect can be stacked up to max [10->5] times, and resets upon dodging an Attack.
Dodge rate is increased by [80->200] and takes [8%->10%] reduced DMG.
Crit Chance is increased by [185->150] and Crit DMG is increased by [24%->30%].
Upon attack, causes the target to take [8%->10%] increased All DMG and have their ATK Spd reduced by [8%->100] for 10 sec. This effect activates once every 3 sec.
Attacked targets take [16%->20%] more DMG. Does not stack.
Increases CC ACC of all allies by [100->150]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only 50 additional CC ACC applies.
Increases HP of all allies by [10%->15%]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only 5% additional HP applies.
Block Rate is increased by [150->200] and CC resistance is increased by [150->200].
Increases ATK Spd by [12%->200] and ACC by [120->400].
ATK rises by [15%->20%] and DEF Penetration rises by [120->200].
Mana recovery per second rises by [27%->62.5%] per enemy.
Crit chance increases by [350->400].
Attacked target loses [10%->15%] of ATK and [100->150] of crit. Chance. Does not stack.
Increases Crit DMG of all allies by [12%->30%]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [4%->10%] additional Crit DMG is applied.
Increases Crit Chance of all allies by [90->150]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [45->50] additional Crit Chance applies.
Heal all allies by 1% every sec and increases CC Resist by [60->75]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [0.5%->0.3%] additional healing per sec and [30->25] additional CC Resist apply.
Mana recovery per second rises by [60%->250%].
Increases ATK Spd of all allies by [60->150]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [30->50] additional ATK Spd applies.
Crit Chance is increased by [185->150] and Crit DMG is increased by [24%->30%].
Per each enemy, ATK is increased [6%->7%] and CC Resistance is increased by 30. Can be stacked up to max [5->10] times.
ATK rises equal to [25%->half] of P.DEF and received P.DMG is decreased by 15%.
Dodge rate is increased by [80->200] and takes [8%->10%] reduced DMG.
Increases Lifesteal by [60->200] and ATK Spd by [12%->200].
Increases ATK of all allies by [7%->15%]. If the ally uses the same Perk, only [3.5%->3%] additional ATK applies.
Mana recovery per second rises by [60%->250%].
Receives 15% more DMG but gains [35%->40%] ATK. ACC is increases by [150->200].
Increases Crit Chance by [185->200] and DEF Penetration by [120->200].
